epic.title: EVA Brain v1 (Retired — superseded by 33-eva-brain-v2)
epic.description: Original EVA Brain — PubSec Information Assistant monolith decomposition. v1 architecture with full README (1098 lines), .git, .github, extensive docs. RETIRED 2026-02-13 when 33-eva-brain-v2 reached Sprint-5 milestone with 486/486 tests. No new work should target this folder. Links to 33-eva-brain-v2 for all active development.

features.title: Archive Reference — v1 Decomposition Artifacts
features.description: Historical artifacts: architecture docs, decomposition decisions, interface contracts from the PubSec monolith extraction. Preserved as read-only reference for 33-eva-brain-v2 design decisions.

user_stories.title: [BRAIN-V1-WI-0] Archive v1 artifacts — mark repo retired, link to 33-eva-brain-v2
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: README.md updated with RETIRED banner and pointer to 33-eva-brain-v2. Branch protection set to read-only. ADO Epic linked to 33-eva-brain-v2 Epic as predecessor.
